name: gmail-triage
description: Auto-triages your unread inbox into Action / Reply / Archive / Spam and prepares a one-click reply draft per message. Runs on demand or every 15 min.
author: Passio team

settings.label: License key
settings.description: Paste the license key you got after purchase (payload.sig).

settings.label: Auto-draft replies
settings.description: Generate a draft reply for every Action/Reply-category email.

settings.label: Max emails per run
settings.description: Cap per scheduler tick to keep costs predictable.
